creator: rflynn@acsalaska.net
text:
On 26-5-2012 2:33, Sylvio Cesar Teixeira wrote:
> Where is the new patch to http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=166811 ??

There is no new patch. That submission is valid, no changes have been
made to it as there are no parts in the slave port that change with
releases.
Compare with:
https://redports.org/browser/melflynn/net/nss-pam-ldapd-sasl/Makefile

which is what the buildlogs are based on.
-- 
Mel
